title: Infosys Foundation Commits over INR 48 Crore for Maternal and Child Healthcare in Rural Karnataka
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced a CSR collaboration with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in rural Karnataka. The Foundation pledged over INR 48 crore to improve maternal and child healthcare infrastructure, facilities, and some operational costs. The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 individuals annually through free medical care.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation collaborated with Prashanthi Balamandira Trust to support Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital in providing free medical care to underprivileged women, infants, and children in rural Karnataka.
Infosys Foundation pledged a grant of over INR 48 crore to augment healthcare infrastructure and facilities in maternal and childcare services.
The initiative is expected to benefit over 8,000 deserving individuals annually.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation committed funding to improve free maternal and child healthcare services in rural Karnataka through Sri Sathya Sai Sarla Memorial Hospital.
